zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Bigge於1479年10月27日出生在英國肯特貝嫩登時，他的父親John Bigge26歲，母親Alice Glover19歲。他於1495年與Joan Hendley在英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1533年11月4日在英國肯特享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Bigge于1479年10月27日出生在英国肯特貝嫩登时，他的父亲John Bigge26岁，母亲Alice Glover19岁。他于1495年与Joan Hendley在英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1533年11月4日在英国肯特享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Bigge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bigg
meanings: English: from Middle English bigge ‘large, strong, stout’, presumably a descriptive nickname for a large, strong person.
English: topographic name from Middle English big ‘building’, a derivative of Middle English biggen (Old Norse byggja) ‘to build’.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Bick   or of some other similar (like-sounding) name from continental Europe (compare   Big   2).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Bigge was born on 27 October 1479, in Benenden, Kent, England, his father, John Bigge, was 26 and his mother, Alice Glover, was 19. He married Joan Hendley in 1495, in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 4 November 1533, in Kent, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Bigge est né le 27 octobre 1479, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Bigge, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Glover, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hendley en 1495, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 4 novembre 1533, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Joan Hendley nel 1495, nel Benenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 8 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Richard Biggeが1479年10月27日にイギリスケントベンエンデンで生まれた時，父John Biggeは26歳，母Alice Gloverは19歳であった。1495年にイギリスイギリスケントベンエンデンでJoan Hendleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1533年11月4日にイギリスケントで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントクランブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Bigge(이)가 1479년 10월 27일 영국 켄트 베니든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Bigge(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Glover(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베니든에서 Joan Hendley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1533년 11월 4일 영국 켄트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Bigge nasceu em 27 de outubro de 1479, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bigge, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Glover, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hendley em 1495, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de novembro de 1533, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Bigge родился 27 октября 1479 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Bigge было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Glover, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hendley в 1495 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 4 ноября 1533 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
